sections.paragraph:
Original: קשׁה

Transliteration: qâsheh

Phonetic: kaw-sheh'

BDB Definition:

  1. hard, cruel, severe, obstinate
    1. hard, difficult
    2. severe
    3. fierce, intense, vehement
    4. stubborn, stiff of neck, stiff-necked
    5. rigorous (of battle)

Origin: from H7185

TWOT entry: 2085a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
